title: Boundless Bundles
body:
# Boundless Bundles  
### String Colors
You can change the color of a bundle's string by combining it with wool. Use string to revert to the original color.  
### Hiding Contents
You can hide a bundle's contents from it's tooltip by combining it with a phantom membrane. Use an amethyst shard to bring it back.  
  
---
